items.description: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is included among the 10 Best S&P 500 Dividend Stocks to Invest in. Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is a diversified conglomerate with operations spanning aerospace, commercial buildings, data centers, energy, and healthcare. The company has a global footprint, with 750 sites spread across about 80 countries. By the close of 2026, […]
